title: Fix bit-select sensitivity lists leaking LLHD ops (Fixes #9469)

features.name: always_ff posedge clock from bit-select of multi-bit signal
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block whose posedge clock is a single-bit select from a wide input signal, e.g. @(posedge data[0])

features.name: always_ff with async reset using two bit-selects in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with both posedge clock and negedge reset drawn from bit-selects of the same wide input vector

features.name: wire alias of bit-select used as clock in always_ff
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned from a bit-select of a wide input, then used as the posedge clock in an always_ff sensitivity list

features.name: always_latch with bit-select enable from wide input
features.description: Code should include an always_latch block whose enable/reset condition is a bit-select from a wide multi-bit input signal
